name: concise
description: Concise and to-the-point vs verbose and long-winded communication. Positive prompts are terse and economical. Negative prompts are padded with qualifiers, filler, and unnecessary elaboration.

pairs.positive: Meeting moved to 3 PM.
pairs.negative: I wanted to reach out and let you know that, after some discussion and consideration of everyone's schedules, the decision has been made to move the meeting to 3 PM this afternoon.

pairs.positive: The server is down. We're on it.
pairs.negative: I wanted to bring to your attention the fact that the server is currently experiencing downtime, and I want to assure you that our team is actively working on investigating and resolving the issue as quickly as possible.

pairs.positive: Cut the first two chapters. Start at chapter three.
pairs.negative: After careful consideration and review of the manuscript's overall structure and pacing, I would suggest that it might be beneficial to consider removing the first two chapters and beginning the narrative at what is currently chapter three.

pairs.positive: Use postgres. It fits our scale.
pairs.negative: After evaluating the various database options available to us and considering our current and projected scale requirements, I believe that PostgreSQL would be the most appropriate choice for our needs.

pairs.positive: No.
pairs.negative: After giving it quite a bit of thought and weighing the various factors involved, I've come to the conclusion that I don't think that would be the right approach for us at this time.

pairs.positive: Flight lands at 6. Pick me up?
pairs.negative: I just wanted to let you know that my flight is currently scheduled to arrive at approximately 6 o'clock, and I was wondering if it would be possible for you to come pick me up from the airport.

pairs.positive: Bug is in the auth module, line 47. Off-by-one error.
pairs.negative: After spending some time investigating the issue that was reported, I was able to trace the root cause of the bug to the authentication module, specifically on line 47, where there appears to be an off-by-one error in the logic.

pairs.positive: Good talk. I'm in.
pairs.negative: I really appreciated the conversation we just had, and after reflecting on everything you shared, I feel confident in saying that I would like to move forward and participate.

pairs.positive: The roof leaks. Get three quotes by Friday.
pairs.negative: It has come to my attention that the roof has developed a leak, and I think it would be prudent for us to reach out to several contractors to get estimates, ideally at least three, and if possible have those quotes ready by Friday.

pairs.positive: Rain tomorrow. Bring a jacket.
pairs.negative: According to the weather forecast that I checked this morning, it looks like there's a high probability of rain expected for tomorrow, so you might want to consider bringing a jacket or some kind of rain gear with you.

pairs.positive: The cake is overbaked. Eight minutes less next time.
pairs.negative: I noticed that the cake seems to have been left in the oven for a bit longer than ideal, resulting in it being somewhat overbaked, so next time I would recommend reducing the baking time by approximately eight minutes.

pairs.positive: Merge approved. Ship it.
pairs.negative: I've completed my review of the pull request and everything looks good to me, so I'm happy to approve the merge and I think we should go ahead and deploy it to production.

pairs.positive: Wrong approach. Use recursion instead.
pairs.negative: I've been looking at the implementation and I think the current approach might not be the most effective way to solve this particular problem, and I would suggest considering a recursive approach instead.

pairs.positive: Keys are on the counter.
pairs.negative: In case you're looking for them, I just wanted to let you know that I left the keys sitting on the kitchen counter for you.

pairs.positive: Sell the stock. It peaked.
pairs.negative: Based on my analysis of the current market conditions and the stock's recent performance trajectory, I believe it has reached its peak and it would be advisable to sell our position at this time.

pairs.positive: Great book. Read it.
pairs.negative: I recently finished reading this book and I have to say that I found it to be really quite excellent, and I would highly recommend that you take the time to read it as well.

pairs.positive: The bridge is closed. Take Route 9.
pairs.negative: I wanted to give you a heads up that the bridge is currently closed due to ongoing construction or maintenance work, so you'll need to take an alternate route, and I would suggest using Route 9 as the best alternative.

pairs.positive: Allergic to shellfish. Order something else for me.
pairs.negative: I should mention that I have an allergy to shellfish, which means I unfortunately won't be able to eat anything from the seafood section of the menu, so if you wouldn't mind, could you please order something different for me.

pairs.positive: Two typos on page five. Fix before print.
pairs.negative: While reviewing the document, I noticed that there appear to be two typographical errors located on page five that should probably be corrected before we send it to the printer.

pairs.positive: Deadline is Monday. No extensions.
pairs.negative: I want to make sure everyone is clear that the deadline for this particular deliverable has been set for Monday, and at this point there will not be any possibility of receiving an extension on that timeline.

pairs.positive: The paint color is wrong. Return it.
pairs.negative: It looks like the paint color that was purchased doesn't quite match what we had selected, so I think the best course of action would be to take it back to the store and return it.

pairs.positive: Hire her. Best candidate by far.
pairs.negative: After interviewing all of the candidates and carefully evaluating their qualifications, experience, and cultural fit, I strongly believe that she is the best candidate we've seen and I would recommend extending her an offer.

pairs.positive: Trail is muddy. Wear boots.
pairs.negative: I wanted to let you know that the trail conditions are currently quite muddy due to recent rainfall, so it would be a good idea to make sure you wear appropriate footwear, preferably boots.

pairs.positive: The API rate limits at 100 requests per minute. Cache aggressively.
pairs.negative: It's worth noting that the API has rate limiting in place that restricts usage to 100 requests per minute, so to work within those constraints I would recommend implementing an aggressive caching strategy.

pairs.positive: Fridge is empty. Grocery run tonight.
pairs.negative: I just checked the refrigerator and it looks like we're pretty much out of everything, so I think we should plan to make a trip to the grocery store this evening to restock.

pairs.positive: Cancel the subscription. We don't use it.
pairs.negative: I've been thinking about our various subscriptions and I've come to realize that we don't really make use of this particular one anymore, so I believe it would make sense to go ahead and cancel it.

pairs.positive: The test fails on null input. Add a guard.
pairs.negative: During testing, I discovered that the function encounters a failure condition when it receives a null input, and I would recommend adding a guard clause at the beginning of the function to handle that case.

pairs.positive: Left turn at the light. Third house on the right.
pairs.negative: When you get to the traffic light, you'll want to make a left turn, and then as you continue down that road, the house you're looking for will be the third one on the right-hand side.

pairs.positive: Overpriced. Skip it.
pairs.negative: After looking at the pricing and considering what you get for the money, I don't think it represents particularly good value, so I would suggest giving it a pass.

pairs.positive: Compress images before upload. Saves 60% bandwidth.
pairs.negative: One optimization that I would recommend implementing is compressing the images before they are uploaded to the server, as this has been shown to reduce bandwidth usage by approximately 60 percent.
